title: Waypointers
description: Save coordinates without leaving the game
body:
# waypointers
save coordinates without leaving the game.

## what
this is an alternative to waypoints in minimap mods, without the minimap part.
you can also consider this a remake of [MCG](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcg).

## why
same reason as the author of MCG:
> I personally believe that full minimap mods add too many extra features or get in the player's way in general.

tl;dr: bloat.

## support for older than 1.21.x?
[MCG](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcg) supports pretty much every version before 1.21.x.

## license
the mod is licensed under hsza's RQL license. you can also check it in [`LICENSE.md`](https://git.braindead.cc/dot/waypointers/src/branch/main/LICENSE.md).
